title: Immersive Bedrock
description: Immersive Bedrock adds functionality to break bedrock with netherite pickaxes and craft the resulting shards into bedrock tools.
body:
# Immersive Bedrock Immersive Bedrock aims to add an immersive way to break bedrock and craft it into valuable tools. Bedrock will now drop bedrock shards when broken. Combining four bedrock shards with a netherite ingot will yield a bedrock ingot for use in upgrades or raw crafting. A full set of bedrock tools is added, with armor and reinforced shields planned for a future update. # Features - Bedrock is breakable with vanilla tools (tool level configurable)! - Mining speed is affected by enchantments and slowdown effects! - A new set of tools (sharper, more durable but less enchantable)! - Configuration file for modpack integration! - Compatible with a wide range of mods! - Zero dependencies! # Getting Started To get started, break some bedrock with your favorite netherite pickaxe (has to be your favorite!) Craft the shards with a netherite ingot to get a bedrock ingot:

Assuming you have already found Netherite Smithing Templates, you can upgrade your netherite tools at a Smithing Table as shown below:

If you haven't found the smithing templates yet, fear not! You can craft the tools directly if preferred:

# Gallery # Future Plans - Bedrock Reinforced Shields - Bedrock Armor Set - Bedrock blocks craftable with 9 shards (configurable) - Other forms of bedrock building blocks (bricks and etc) Please let us know if you encounter any issues with the mod. Feel free to use this mod in modpacks as you see fit.
